name: shell
description: Property keywords for the 3DEC shell structural element. Assign with 'structure shell create ...', set elastic behavior with 'structure shell cmodel ...', then set these with 'structure shell property <keyword> <value> [range ...]'.

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: 'structure shell property' keywords (2D-only keywords omitted; 3DEC is 3D).
